DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Whether the successor follows predecessor success or failure.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Object selector for object-scoped dependency resolution.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Reason recorded with the policy row.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: MetaOrchestration workspace. Defaults to the current directory.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Object selector for object-scoped dependency resolution.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Reason recorded with the policy row.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: MetaOrchestration workspace. Defaults to the current directory.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Data object whose append writers can overlap.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Reason recorded with the policy row.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: MetaOrchestration workspace. Defaults to the current directory.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Conversion policy workspace passed to child workers.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Maximum concurrently granted pipeline tasks. Default: 1.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Operational DB connection environment variable passed to child workers.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: MetaPipeline workspace used by child pipeline workers.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Operational root for run journals, worker logs, and workspace execution leases.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Startup/activation timeout. Omitted follows --worker-event-timeout-seconds; 0 disables activation timeout.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Timeout while waiting for child workers to connect to the named pipe. 0 or omitted means no timeout.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Timeout for silent worker protocol periods. 0 or omitted means no timeout.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: MetaOrchestration workspace. Defaults to the current directory.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Issue id or unique issue code.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: MetaOrchestration workspace. Defaults to the current directory.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Description recorded on the orchestration plan.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Directory where the MetaOrchestration workspace will be created.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: MetaOrchestration workspace. Defaults to the current directory.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: MetaOrchestration workspace. Defaults to the current directory.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: MetaOrchestration workspace. Defaults to the current directory.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: MetaOrchestration workspace. Defaults to the current directory.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Lock behavior for the object/effect pair.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Left write effect, such as Append, Replace, Mutation, KeyedUpsert, or ConditionalKeyedUpsert.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Data object whose effect interaction is being resolved.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Reason recorded with the policy row.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Right write effect, such as Append, Replace, Mutation, KeyedUpsert, or ConditionalKeyedUpsert.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: MetaOrchestration workspace. Defaults to the current directory.
